examples: The flooding, caused by three days of torrential rain, is the worst in sixty-five years.
Strong winds and torrential rain combined to make conditions terrible for golfers in the Scottish Open.
The game was cancelled owing to torrential rain.
After torrential rain and historical flooding, Hurricane Sandy left more than 20, 000 flights cancelled this week.
One job found him working outside as a bricklayer in the middle of a torrential storm.
